steps.assistant_text: gl_func_00071864 = libultra __osSumcalc (io/contpfs.c) statically linked into game_libs. Verbatim libreultra source. Key insight: the documented 'stack-residency + filled delay slots = un-reproducible cap' only tested IDO 7.1; the original object came from libultra built with IDO 5.3 -O1, which reproduces it exactly. Per-file CC override to 5.3 + TRUNCATE_TEXT 0x5C (section pad nop).
